creatures.name: Chizpurfle
creatures.additional_social_rules: Chizpurfle cannot be persuaded, but could be lured by magical items.

parts.name: Chizpurfle Carapaces
parts.description: Chizpurfle Carapaces are known to help with the containment of magical effects. Many believe these could be used as debuffs. Others have employed them as a component in antidotes.

parts.name: Chizpurfle Fangs
parts.description: Chizpurfle Fangs are used in a popular healing potion, the wiggenweld potion. However, no other known healing concoctions include this ingredient. Other potioncrafters believe chizpurfle fangs can be enchantment stripping. A less popular theory suggests that they may help with potions that would hypothetically point the drinker toward magical objects or otherwise make them more attuned to magic or magical objects.

parts.name: Chizpurfle Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Chizpurfle are small insert-like creatures that are attracted to, and consume, magical items. Clearing an infestation can be very difficult.

creatures.name: Clabbert
creatures.additional_social_rules: Clabberts can be persuaded using Magical Creatures skill.

parts.name: Clabbert Pustules
parts.description: Clabbert Pustules aren't known to have a significant potion effect. Though many potioncrafters continue to explore potential practical uses for them.

parts.name: Clabbert Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Clabberts are tree-dwelling creatures typically found in South America. They are somewhat monkey-like and somewhat frog-like. Their ground agility/speed can be used for tree-swinging agility/speed. Tries to flee in battle.

creatures.name: Grindylow
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be persuaded by humans.

parts.name: Grindylow Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Grindylow are a breed of merperson. They are agressive

creatures.name: Pixie
creatures.additional_social_rules: Pixies cannot be tamed or bonded with, but they can be intimidated.

parts.name: Pixie Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Pixies are mischievous creatures that can be difficult to contain. They are more known for property damage and destruction than harming people. Wands are among their favorite items to steal (see steal attack).

creatures.name: Imp
creatures.additional_social_rules: Imps cannot be tamed or bonded with, but they can be intimidated.

parts.name: Imp Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Imps are mischievous creatures (similar to pixies) that can be difficult to contain. They are more known for property damage and destruction than harming people. Wands are among their favorite items to steal (see steal attack).

creatures.name: Jobberknoll
creatures.additional_social_rules: Persuasion must rely on Magical Creatures Skill.

parts.name: Jobberknoll Beak
parts.description: Jobberknoll beak has long be thought to have a use in potioning. Many potioneers believe it can impact depressive damage, especially with respect to grieving, but no formula is yet widely known.

parts.name: Jobberknoll Feather
parts.description: Jobberknoll Feather, when added to a potion, ensures that the potion will have an effect on the brain or mental processes. This cannot fail. Essentially, if Jobberknoll feather is included, the potion will have some cognitive effect even if it is not the intended one.

parts.name: Jobberknoll Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Jobberknolls are small magical birds that are noiseless until the moment of their death. When they die, they repeat every sound they have ever heard in reverse.

creatures.name: Crup
creatures.additional_social_rules: Will only ever bond with one human in their lifetime.

parts.name: Crup Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Crups are magical dogs with tails split in two. They are extremely loyal.

parts.name: Doxy Venom
parts.description: Doxy Venom is rather weak, but can be used as a pesticide, slugicide, wormicide, or for other similar effects.

parts.name: Doxy Eggs
parts.description: Doxy eggs can produce an edurance effect when added to potions.

creatures.description: Doxies are small dangerous creatures with flight ability. Their queens are particularly dangerous.

parts.name: Jarvey Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Jarvey are small ferret-like creatures. They are known to spew insults and other words of condemnation at humans they encounter. Though they can speak, they are incapable of conversation. They will only bite if grabbed.

creatures.name: Lobalug
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be persuaded by humans.

parts.name: Lobalug Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Lobalug Venom
parts.description: Useful in some potions.

creatures.description: Lobalug are small thin aquatic creatures that shoot venom out of pulpy sacks. Merpeople may sometimes use a lobalug as a weapon.

creatures.name: Murtlap
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be persuaded by humans.

parts.name: Murtlap Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Murtlap oils
parts.description: Murtlap Oils are thought to be useful as solvents. On its own, it serves as an important water treatment for keeping waterplants healthy when grown in aquariums.

parts.name: Murtlap Tentacles
parts.description: Murtlap Tentacles are usually a healing agent, but can sometimes act as a stabilizing agent.

creatures.description: Murtlap are small rat-like creatures that live in shallow water. Their backs look like sea anemones.

creatures.name: Mortis Bat
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and bonded with, but will be aggressive during daytime hours regardless.

attacks.name: Rage Attack
attacks.description: When a bat awakes during the day, the bat can use this attack (will not attack allies).

parts.name: Bat Wings
parts.description: Bat Wings are believed to be able to producing a levitating effect. Otherwise, it's used in the armadillo bile mixture with an unknown effect.

parts.name: Bat Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Mortis bats are venomous species of bat. Since they sleep during the day, they will typically not attack. However, if they are awoken, they will attack with one level higher damage amount.

creatures.name: Ramora
creatures.additional_social_rules: Ramora cannot be persuaded.

parts.name: Ramora Scales
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Ramora are massive water-dwelling beasts that typically live in the Indian ocean. They have massive suckers on their backs which they use to anchor boats in place.

creatures.name: Billywig
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be persuaded.

parts.name: Billywig Sting Slime
parts.description: Billywig Sting Slime is a stabilizing agent. Adding it to a potentially failing potion can help to stabilize the concoction.

parts.name: Billywig Wing
parts.description: Billywig Wings usually creating a disorienting effect in potions.

parts.name: Moist Billywig Stings
parts.description: Moist Billywig Stings are believed to be capable of creating a potion that produces a healing effect for depressive damage (on account of the fact that being stung by a billywig produces giddiness). Many researchers have been searching for a successful concoction using this logic.

creatures.description: Billywigs are small blue magical creatures whose stings cause levitation and incapacitating giddiness.

creatures.name: Fire Crab
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and lured but cannot be bonded with. Tame value must beat a 10.

parts.name: Fire Crab Shell
parts.description: Not useful in potions. However, the jeweled shell is extremely valuable. Jewels on the shell can be extracted and sold.

creatures.description: Fire crabs are crabs found in Fiji that shoot flames from their arses to defend themselves.

creatures.name: Fwooper
creatures.additional_social_rules: Persuasion must rely on Magical Creatures Skill.

parts.name: Fwooper Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Fwooper Feathers
parts.description: Can be used as colorful quills or in potions.

parts.name: Fwooper Eggs
parts.description: Eggs have interesting patterns. Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Fwoopers are bright birds which sing high pitched, sanity-shaking songs. They are native to Africa and are often sold in marketplaces worldwide with a permanent silencing charm placed on them. The song lists a a damage over time, however, the damage only occurs over time if the fwooper continues to sing. As soon as the listener can no longer hear the song, they will stop taking damage from it.

creatures.name: Mackled Malaclaw
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and lured but cannot be bonded with. Tame value must beat a 10.

parts.name: Mackled Malaclaw Antenne
parts.description: Unknown use. Discovered by Penelope Evans.

parts.name: Mackled Malaclaw Keratin
parts.description: Unknown use. Discovered by Penelope Evans.

parts.name: Mackled Malaclaw Meat
parts.description: Can be consumed or used in potions.

parts.name: Mackled Malaclaw Shell
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Mackled Malaclaws are similar to lobsters, though silvery-grey in appearance. Their bite causes bad luck for the next day (-5 to all rolls). Eating a mackled malaclaw will result in being sick including with a significant rash.

creatures.name: Wraith
creatures.additional_social_rules: Wraith cannot be persuaded.
creatures.description: Wraith are terrifying spirits. Their looming presence attack occurs anytime you are within 500 feet of them. Their damage will occur while you are in range and will discontinue when you are out of range.

creatures.name: Hag
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be persuaded.

parts.name: Mottled Hag Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Hags are hideous-looking creatures that resemble an old witch. They will try to feast upon the flesh of young children. Hags will cast spells from their own spellbook. The level of spell they will cast will be their Heavy Wound Capacity -3.

creatures.name: Veela
creatures.additional_social_rules: No social attempts will work except to try to calm the veela. If you do successfully calm it, it will instantly transform back into the untransformed version of itself.

parts.name: Humanform Veela Hair
parts.description: Veela Hair is exceptionally useful in beautifying products and in hair-care products. A single strand is highly valuable, but so powerful that it can be used to make massive batches of product.

parts.name: Transformed Veela Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: An untransformed Veela is an alluringly beautiful woman-like creature. Their alluring beauty means all social skills rolls are made at an value of 20. They can also perform a beautiful dance which will ensnare the minds of anyone attracted to human women.

creatures.name: Half Giant
creatures.additional_social_rules: Use typical human social skills for all interactions.
creatures.description: Half Giants are giant-human hybirds (usually with some magical power).

creatures.name: Pukwudgie
creatures.additional_social_rules: May be persuaded using a Magical Creatures roll of 20.

parts.name: Pukwudgie Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Pukwudgie are human-like creatures that are typically approximately two to three feet tall. They have larger fingers, toes, arms, ears and noses. They can disappear (similar to apparating) and may transform into cougars or porcupine. Additionally, they can harm by casting a simple fire spell and may heal themselves using a simple healing spell (the damage on the healing attack is the amount of healing able to be produced). This healing works for all wound types.

creatures.name: House Elf
creatures.additional_social_rules: Most social interactions follow the rules for typical human interactions. However, you cannot persuade an owned house elf to betray its master.

attacks.name: Elvish Force
attacks.description: This is a magical force attack

parts.name: Elf Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: House Elves are smaller humanoid creatures that have been indoctrinated into wizard servitude. They cast their own spells (from their own spellbook) which is quite powerful. Even if they dislike their master, they will remain loyal to them until/unless they are freed (through the gifting of clothes).

creatures.name: Vampire
creatures.additional_social_rules: Use typical human social skills for all interactions.

parts.name: Vampire Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: While many myths about vampires pervade muggle culture, they are a highly secretive race and little is truly known about their powers and weaknesses. They are certainly undead, with the ability to perform magic. Their bite will turn one into a vampire (with the conversion taking approximately one week and having no known cure).

creatures.name: Sasabonsam
creatures.additional_social_rules: Use typical human social skills for all interactions.

parts.name: Sasabonsam Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Sasabonsam are African, tree-dwelling beasts with iron teeth and long spindly appendages and claws. They appear somewhat monkey-like and somewhat orge-like, but are not hybrids. Their ground movement stats also serve as their tree-dwelling movement statistics.

creatures.name: Zombie
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be socially interacted with other than luring with human flesh.

parts.name: Zombie Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Zombies are undead animated corpses. They tend to roam in packs. If bitten or scratched by a zombie, you will slowly die and then become a zombie.

creatures.name: Half-Vampire
creatures.additional_social_rules: Use typical human social skills for all interactions.
creatures.description: Half Vampires are the product of a vampire and human mating. Half-vampires have weaker vampiric abilities but progress typically as wizards (if they have wizarding ability at all). Their bite will not turn one into a vampire.

creatures.name: Goblin
creatures.additional_social_rules: Most social interactions follow the rules for typical human interactions. However, they will always serve their own interests and are naturally distrustful and standoffish with humans.

parts.name: Goblin Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Goblins are smaller humanoid creatures. They are powerful magical beings with a rich history and somewhat contentious relationship with wizards. They use their own spellbook. They cast spells at their magical resistance -6.

creatures.name: Bogeyman
creatures.additional_social_rules: Bogeymen cannot be persuaded.

parts.name: Bogeyman Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Bogeymen are scary spirits that tend to inhabit the closets of young children. They are averse to any light and will take damage from prolonged exposure to light.

creatures.name: Boggart
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be interacted with socially.
creatures.description: Boggarts are shapeshifters. They hide in closets (much like bogeymen) but when they confront a human, they will take the form of whatever that person fears the most. The only known defense against Boggarts is the ridiculus spell which will neutralize and reverse any anxiety-producing damage caused by the boggart. Each cast of ridiculus also causes the boggart 1L damage.

creatures.name: Poltergeist
creatures.additional_social_rules: Interact with Poltergeists using typical social skills. The Poltergeist will always prefer to play tricks than remain loyal to any particular creature.
creatures.description: Poltergeists bond with places (usually well populated places) and are known for mischief (similar to hobgoblins). They are more a nuisance than a danger. The Poltergeist will attempt to steal items from humans in the area and will throw objects.

creatures.name: Ghost
creatures.additional_social_rules: Interact with ghosts using typical social skills.

parts.name: Ghost Vapor
parts.description: Ghost Vapor is most notable for producing anxiety-related effects and seems to be related to creating corporealily-related effects.

parts.name: Ectoplasm
parts.description: Ectoplasm is used in very powerful potions. It appears to affect the perturbability (for lack of a better word) of the potion. If it is included in the potion, the potion itself will, usually, have a considerable magical resistance. Ectoplasm on its own appears to be an important component to communing with certain spirits.

creatures.description: Ghosts are spirits. They sometimes haunt and sometimes just inhabit spaces. Their demeanor is dependent on their personality when alive. They can be social creatures and will fully die when they resolve their unfinished business. Many ghosts never do. They cause 1M wound of scary presence damage.

creatures.name: Dementor
creatures.additional_social_rules: Few know how to interact with Dementors, but they have been known to form contracts with humans and abide by Wizarding Law. Thus, many scholars believe that there are possible methods for interacting with them.
creatures.description: Dementors are dark spirits that devour the souls of humans. They feed off of fear and prey on misery. Their chilling presence causes a cold burn and this occurs anytime you are in their presence. They can be banished by using a patronus charm, but this charm causes them no damage.

creatures.name: Lethifold
creatures.additional_social_rules: There are no known ways of interacting with Lethifold.

parts.name: Ectoplasm
parts.description: Ectoplasm is used in very powerful potions. It appears to affect the perturbability (for lack of a better word) of the potion. If it is included in the potion, the potion itself will, usually, have a considerable magical resistance. Ectoplasm on its own appears to be an important component to communing with certain spirits.

creatures.description: Lethifold are dark spirits that devour whole humans. They are exceptionally dangerous.

creatures.name: Banshee
creatures.additional_social_rules: There are no known ways of interacting with Banshee but many scholars believe it is possible.
creatures.description: Banshee are dark spirits whose shriek can instantly kill. If the Banshee is startled, it will shriek. If you are specifically trying not to startle it, you must roll 1d20 for every real-world minute. The creature will shriek if a natural 1 is rolled.

creatures.name: Inferi
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be socially interacted with other than luring with human flesh.
creatures.description: Inferi are undead animated corpses which must be raised through dark magic.

creatures.name: Rat
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and trained using Magical Creatures skill (roll of 5). Rats will form packs.

parts.name: Rat Entrails
parts.description: Rat Entrails used to be used as a coloring agent and as a means of ensuring that a given potion would produce dark effects. These days, most researchers are exploring whether it can be detection-evading-related when added to certain concoctions.

parts.name: Rat Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Rat Spleen
parts.description: Rat spleen is a destabilizing agent in potions. When added, it produces an unknown and unexpected effect (determined by the headmaster).

creatures.description: Rats are small rodents without magical abilities.

creatures.name: Eagle
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be trained. May become violent on failed rolls (roll 1d4 where 1 yields a violent response).

parts.name: Eagle Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Eagle's Blood
parts.description: Eagle's Blood is believed to produce mental clarity when added to potions.

creatures.description: Eagles are magestic, but non-magical creatures.

creatures.name: Stag
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed but not trained using Magical Creatures skill (roll of 5).

parts.name: Stag Hide
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Stags are magestic male deer.

creatures.name: Crow
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and trained (Magical Creatures roll of 10).

parts.name: Crow Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Crows are common non-magical birds without magical power.

creatures.name: Raven
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and trained (Magical Creatures roll of 12).

parts.name: Raven Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Ravens are common non-magical birds.

creatures.name: Doe
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed but not trained using Magical Creatures skill (roll of 5).

parts.name: Doe Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Does are female deer. They are non-magical

creatures.name: Eel
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed or trained. Can be lured with food.

parts.name: Eel Eyes
parts.description: Eel eyes impact vision, eye size, color, and other features with respect to the eyes when added to potions.

parts.name: Eel Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Eel are water creatures without appendages or limbs

creatures.name: Sloth
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, trained, or lured (on account of their being supremely stupid for a mammal).

parts.name: Sloth Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Sloth Brain Mucus
parts.description: Using these in potions appears to produce an effect that makes the drinker dumber and more physically slow. The ingredient may also be used to increase the thickness of a particular potion.

creatures.description: Sloths are moronic slow-moving creatures that sometimes fall out of trees. Their Ground AGI/SPD are used for their tree speed movement.

creatures.name: Chicken
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be captured and lured. Their training is limited to very basic commands. Otherwise, they cannot be trained or bonded with.

parts.name: Chicken Carcass
parts.description: Chicken Carcass is believed to be useful in muggle-related spells and baits/traps for magical creatures. It also has an unknown effect in the Swelling Solution. Chicken Carcass can help a potion smell slightly better or to increase in viscocity.

parts.name: Chicken Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Chickens are domesticated fowl. Their flight is limited to a few hundred feet.

creatures.name: Turkey
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be captured and lured. Their training is limited to very basic commands. Otherwise, they cannot be trained or bonded with.

parts.name: Turkey Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Turkey are domesticated fowl. Their flight is limited to a few hundred feet.

creatures.name: Pheasant
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, trained or lured.
creatures.description: Pheasant are game fowl.

creatures.name: Partridge
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, trained or lured.

parts.name: Partridge Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Partridges are game fowl.

creatures.name: Guinea Fowl
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, trained or lured.

parts.name: Guinea Fowl Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Guinea Fowl are a kind of wild fowl.

creatures.name: Peacock
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, trained or lured.

parts.name: Peacock Feather
parts.description: Peacock feather can help in creating potions that heal animals and creatures.

parts.name: Peacock Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Peacocks are a kind of wild fowl known for their brightly colored tail feathers. Their flight is limited to a few dozen feet at a time.

creatures.name: Duck
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed or bonded with but can be lured and captured.

parts.name: Duck Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Ducks are a kind of water fowl.

creatures.name: Goose
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed or bonded or lured. They'll probably just hiss at you and bite you.

parts.name: Goose Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Geese are a kind of water fowl known for their surly disposition.

creatures.name: Vulture
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed with a difficult Magical Creatures roll of 20.

parts.name: Vulture Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Vulture are scavenging birds of prey.

creatures.name: Lionfish
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured.

parts.name: Lionfish Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Lionfish Spines
parts.description: Lionfish Spines are mildly poisonous to plants.

creatures.description: Lionfish are a kind of fish!

creatures.name: Porcupine
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured.

parts.name: Porcupine Quills
parts.description: A common potion ingredient, Porcupine Quills help to ensure that the potion will have produce some kind of visible physical effect on the other's body, usually involving their hair. This is often added to healing potions that have been failing to properly affect the imbiber's body.

parts.name: Porcupine Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Porcupines are big ol' non-magical rodents.

creatures.name: Crocodile
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured.

parts.name: Crocodile Heart
parts.description: Crocodile Heart appears to be quite volitile in potions. As such, it produces seemingly-random effects (Determined by the headmaster).

parts.name: Crocodile Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Crocodiles are large aggresive reptiles.

creatures.name: Dragonfly
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured.

parts.name: Dragonfly Thorax
parts.description: Dragonfly thoraxes are, historically, a stabilizing agent as well as a component that produces a chalky composition in potions. More recently, potioncrafters seem to have deviated away from this ingredient in favor of various others

creatures.description: Dragonflies are common, but pretty cool, little non-magical insects.

creatures.name: Salamander
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed but will only learn basic commands.

parts.name: Salamander Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Salamander Blood
parts.description: Salamander Blood is exclusively used in dark potions and will often have a necrotic or necromantic (as in reanimating or pseudoanimating) effect.

creatures.description: Salamanders are non-magical reptiles.

creatures.name: Snake
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be tamed or bonded with using parsletongue.

parts.name: Snake Fang
parts.description: Snake fang is usually drained of its venom. After this, the fang itself is typically found to support health, vitality, and strength. It's believed that because the fang itself must be able to withstand the corrosive impact of the venom, it is, itself, strong, resilient, and magically protective. For this reason, many scholars believe that snake fang could be used in a magical resistance potion.

parts.name: Snake Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Snakes are aggressive reptiles.

creatures.name: Horse
creatures.additional_social_rules: Horses can be bonded with (Magical Creatures skill of 10).

parts.name: Horse Hide
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Twine of Horse Hair
parts.description: Horse Hair is useful in spells to improve concentration. However, it is quite volitile.

creatures.description: Horse are hooved beasts that are easily domesticated pack animals.

creatures.name: Frog
creatures.additional_social_rules: Frogs can be captured.

parts.name: Frog Brains
parts.description: Frog Brains appears to affect intelligence and intelligence-linked skills.

parts.name: Frog Legs
parts.description: Frog Parts are an important component in potions that have a water-related effect. It also appears to be an important component of the Death-Cap Draught for unknown reasons.

parts.name: Frog Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Frogs are non-magical amphibians

creatures.name: Scarab Beetles
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, lured, or bonded with.
creatures.description: Scarab Beetles are insects.

creatures.name: Pufferfish
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured. Roll 1d4 at any point you interact with a pufferfish. If you roll a 1, the pufferfish will ballon up to a large size and will be entirely un-interactable until they calm down (usually takes about 30 minutes).

parts.name: Pufferfish Eyes
parts.description: Pufferfish Eyes are used in potions that affect growth or swelling in the body.

parts.name: Pufferfish Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Pufferfish are a kind of fish!

creatures.name: Bat (general)
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and bonded with, but will be aggressive during daytime hours regardless.

parts.name: Bat Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

parts.name: Bat Wings
parts.description: Bat Wings are believed to be able to producing a levitating effect. Otherwise, it's used in the armadillo bile mixture with an unknown effect.

parts.name: Bat Spleen
parts.description: Bat Spleen can either stabilize a potion that has some dark effect or can be used in creature-repelling spells.

creatures.description: Bats are flying mammals

creatures.name: Fairy
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed. It is illegal to capture them as they are seen as free beings.

parts.name: Fairy Wings
parts.description: Fairy Wings impact one of three factors when added to potions, stamina, beauty, or flight/weight.

parts.name: Fairy Eggs
parts.description: Fairy lay about 50 eggs at a time in gardens, forests, or any place with leaves. These eggs are a delicacy to some creatures, like Bowtruckles.
parts.effect_in_potions: Can improve the effects of cosmetic or endurance potions.

parts.name: Fairy Skin
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Fairies are small, peaceful and magestic flighted creatures.

creatures.name: Bundimum
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be interacted with socially.

parts.name: Bundimum Ooze
parts.description: Acts as an acid. When thinned down, Bundimun secretions are employed in certain magical cleaning solutions and used as an ingredient in Doxycide.

creatures.description: Bundimum look like oozy goop. But, they are, infact, oozy and goopy beasts! They are remarkably stupid.

creatures.name: Bear
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed (Magical Creatures roll 20), lured, and bonded with.

parts.name: Bear Pelt
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Bears are large aggressive mammals.

creatures.name: Armadillo
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and trained using Magical Creatures skill (roll of 15).

parts.name: Armadillo Bile
parts.description: Armadillo Bile is weakly corrosive to magical objects. It can be used to strip the magic away. However, the bile alone is so weak that it can only strip minor enchantments. Most potioneers use the Armadillo Bile Solution instead (as it is much more powerful).

parts.name: Armadillo Hide
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Armadillo are small mammals with hard-shelled backs.

creatures.name: Wren
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Marsh Warbler
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Swooping Evil
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.

parts.name: Venom of a Swooping Evil
parts.description: When used on muggles, this substance will erase memories for a limited time period.

creatures.description: An large evil magical creature with a butterfly-like body/wings, a spiny back, and a skull-like head with fangs. When not fighting, these turn into small cocooned green spikey balls.

creatures.name: Spider
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be lured and trapped.

parts.name: Dead Spider
parts.description: Dead Spiders are a stabilizing agent. They also make potions chewable/crunchy… If you are looking for that feature??

parts.name: Spider Pedipalp
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Venomous spiders are spiders with the potential to be harmful through their poisonous bite!

creatures.name: Leech
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed, lured, or bonded with.

parts.name: Dead Leech
parts.description: Dead Leech impact the bloodflow in the body and can be used in the blood replenishing potion. Curiously, they also seem to produce a minor sneezing effect in some concoctions. Researchers have little sense for why this occurs.

creatures.description: Leeches are blood sucking water-dwelling worm-like animals. Their blood sucking DoT only occurs while they are physically attached. They will dry up and die if exposed to the sun.

creatures.name: Caterpillar
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed or bonded with. Can only be lured.

parts.name: Dead Caterpillar
parts.description: Sliced Caterpillars help to improve the potency of particular potions.

creatures.description: Caterpillars are non-magical worm-like creatures that can transform into butterflies.

creatures.name: Waterhog
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can be tamed and bonded with (Magical Creatures roll of 10).

parts.name: Waterhog Hide
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creatures.description: Waterhogs are water dwelling swine. While they cannot fully breathe underwater, they can hold their breath for hours.

creatures.name: Pixiu
creatures.description: AKA, Liondragon

creatures.name: Flesh-Eating Slug
creatures.additional_social_rules: Cannot be tamed or bonded with. Can be Lured with human flesh or trapped.
creatures.description: Flesh-Eating Slugs are often found in magical waters.

creatures.name: Nightingale
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Blackcap
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Blackbird
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Woodlark
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Mistle Thrush
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Skylark
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Robin
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

creatures.name: Song Thrush
creatures.additional_social_rules: Can only be trapped.
creatures.description: A non-magical songbird.

attacks.name: Devouring Maw
attacks.description: An attempt to devour an entire person.

attacks.name: Rapacious Bite
attacks.description: An attempt to take a large bite out of a person

attacks.name: Reliable Bite
attacks.description: A low damage bite attempt with higher reliability

parts.name: Chichevache Milk
parts.description: Milk of the Chichevache, a creature solely fed obedient wives, retains the nature of the women consumed. However, this milk is scarce as the beast is kept in a state of perpetual starvation.
parts.raw_effects: Those who consume the milk have a chance to temporarily lose their will to defy others and become extremely agreeable and cooperative. However, this effect can be overcome with enough mental fortitude or willpower.
parts.effect_in_potions: When added to a potion the effect can be enhanced, making it impossible to resist. It can also boost potions that increase physical capabilities due to the concentrated virtue of the those consumed to make the milk.

creatures.name: Ferret
creatures.additional_social_rules: May occasionally bite even their bonded owners. Headmasters can ask you to roll a magical creatures roll with crit fails or values under 7 resulting in a bite.
creatures.description: Ferrets are wily little non-magical animals.

creatures.name: Bowtruckle
creatures.description: A Bowtruckle served as a tree guardian for its home tree, which was usually a tree whose wood was of wand quality (such as a Wiggentree). It was generally a peaceful creature, but it could attempt to gouge out an attacker's eyes if anything threatened its tree or itself and is adept at dodging most types of charms.

creatures.name: Cane Toad
creatures.additional_social_rules: Lured only by flies or other small insects

parts.name: Cane Toad Skin-Gland Secretions
parts.description: Directly touching these secretions causes 2L wounds of poison damage. Ingesting it causes 4H wounds of poisoning damage.

creatures.description: While the Cane Toad has no direct attacks, if touched, its bufotoxins will cause 2L wounds of poisoning damage (no damage over time). If the entire Toad is eaten, the ingestor will take 4H wounds of poison damage.

parts.name: Fish Scales
parts.description: Fish Scales serve one of two roles in potions. First, they are known to serve as a stabilizing agent in potions (can be used to stabilize failing potions). Second, it is widely believed that fish scales can be used in potions involving underwater breathing. While no formula is known to have worked, many researchers still believe that fish scales are essential to making the formula work.

creatures.name: Rabid Dog
creatures.additional_social_rules: Will respond aggressively always toward any organism

parts.name: Rabid Dog Spittal
parts.description: This spittal can be extracted from a rabid dog.

creatures.name: Su Perisi
creatures.description: Water Nymph endemic to Anatolia / Turkiye

creatures.name: Tadfoal
creatures.description: A baby Hippocampus.

creatures.name: Hippocampus
creatures.description: A mystical aquatic creature characterized by a horse's head and front legs, combined with the tail and back legs of a colossal fish.

parts.name: White River Monster Scales
parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Abarxan Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Acromantula Eggs
creature_parts.description: Female Acromantulas could lay up to one hundred eggs at a time. They usually hatched in six to eight weeks. The British Ministry of Magic classified Acromantula eggs as Class A Non-Tradeable Goods.

creature_parts.name: Acromantula Pedipalp
creature_parts.description: These Pedipalps are highly valuable due to their rarity. They have an unknown effect in exploding potions but appear to be an essential ingredient.

creature_parts.name: Acromantula Venom
creature_parts.description: A powerful venom that can cause significant damage even to very large creatures.

creature_parts.name: Aethonan Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Antipodean Opaleye Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Armadillo Bile
creature_parts.description: Armadillo Bile is weakly corrosive to magical objects. It can be used to strip the magic away. However, the bile alone is so weak that it can only strip minor enchantments. Most potioneers use the Armadillo Bile Solution instead (as it is much more powerful).

creature_parts.name: Armadillo Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Ashwinder Eggs
creature_parts.description: Ashwinder Eggs help to ensure that a particular potion has a high potency. Usually, when it is included in a potion, the potion will be strong or enduring. Must be frozen upon discovery to save for future use.

creature_parts.name: Ashwinder Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Augurey Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Basilisk Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Bat Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Bat Spleen
creature_parts.description: Bat Spleen can either stabilize a potion that has some dark effect or can be used in creature-repelling spells.

creature_parts.name: Bat Wings
creature_parts.description: Bat Wings are believed to be able to producing a levitating effect. Otherwise, it's used in the armadillo bile mixture with an unknown effect.

creature_parts.name: Bear Pelt
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Beetle Eyes
creature_parts.description: Beetle Eyes are a stabilizing agent in many potions. Adding it to failed concoctions can sometimes stabilize the potion and lead to success.

creature_parts.name: Bicorn Hair
creature_parts.description: Bicorn Hair, when added to a potion, will produce a physical/bodily transformation of some kind.

creature_parts.name: Bicorn Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Billywig Sting Slime
creature_parts.description: Billywig Sting Slime is a stabilizing agent. Adding it to a potentially failing potion can help to stabilize the concoction.

creature_parts.name: Billywig Wing
creature_parts.description: Billywig Wings usually creating a disorienting effect in potions.

creature_parts.name: Blast Ended Skrewt Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Bogeyman Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Bonemeal
creature_parts.description: Bonemeal is a very basic potioning ingredient and is a critical component of crystalized water.

creature_parts.name: Boomslang Skin
creature_parts.description: Boomslang Skin can be used to help transfigure a potion's consumer.

creature_parts.name: Bundimum Ooze
creature_parts.description: Acts as an acid. When thinned down, Bundimun secretions are employed in certain magical cleaning solutions and used as an ingredient in Doxycide.

creature_parts.name: Cane Toad Skin-Gland Secretions
creature_parts.description: Directly touching these secretions causes 2L wounds of poison damage. Ingesting it causes 4H wounds of poisoning damage.

creature_parts.name: Centaur Blood
creature_parts.description: Poisonous when touching the skin. Often added to shirts or chitons to slowly poison the wearer until dead.

creature_parts.name: Centaur Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Cerberus Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Chichevache Milk
creature_parts.description: Milk of the Chichevache, a creature solely fed obedient wives, retains the nature of the women consumed. However, this milk is scarce as the beast is kept in a state of perpetual starvation.
creature_parts.raw_effects: Those who consume the milk have a chance to temporarily lose their will to defy others and become extremely agreeable and cooperative. However, this effect can be overcome with enough mental fortitude or willpower.
creature_parts.effect_in_potions: When added to a potion the effect can be enhanced, making it impossible to resist. It can also boost potions that increase physical capabilities due to the concentrated virtue of the those consumed to make the milk.

creature_parts.name: Chicken Carcass
creature_parts.description: Chicken Carcass is believed to be useful in muggle-related spells and baits/traps for magical creatures. It also has an unknown effect in the Swelling Solution. Chicken Carcass can help a potion smell slightly better or to increase in viscocity.

creature_parts.name: Chicken Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Chimera Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Chinese Fireball Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Chizpurfle Carapaces
creature_parts.description: Chizpurfle Carapaces are known to help with the containment of magical effects. Many believe these could be used as debuffs. Others have employed them as a component in antidotes.

creature_parts.name: Chizpurfle Fangs
creature_parts.description: Chizpurfle Fangs are used in a popular healing potion, the wiggenweld potion. However, no other known healing concoctions include this ingredient. Other potioncrafters believe chizpurfle fangs can be enchantment stripping. A less popular theory suggests that they may help with potions that would hypothetically point the drinker toward magical objects or otherwise make them more attuned to magic or magical objects.

creature_parts.name: Chizpurfle Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Chollima Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Clabbert Pustules
creature_parts.description: Clabbert Pustules aren't known to have a significant potion effect. Though many potioncrafters continue to explore potential practical uses for them.

creature_parts.name: Clabbert Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Cockatrice Feather
creature_parts.description: Cockatrice feather can produce a paralytic effect in potions. However its use in the anti-paralysis potion is believed to be produced as a result of another component that has a reversing effect.

creature_parts.name: Cockatrice Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Collection of Lacewing Flies
creature_parts.description: Lacewing Flies are used in potions that affect something with respect to the body.

creature_parts.name: Crocodile Heart
creature_parts.description: Crocodile Heart appears to be quite volitile in potions. As such, it produces seemingly-random effects (Determined by the headmaster).

creature_parts.name: Crocodile Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Cropped Krup Tail
creature_parts.description: Perhaps because of the perceived waste of a perfectly good tail, many researchers think that krup tails have a potioning use, though few solid theories on their purpose currently exist.

creature_parts.name: Crow Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Crup Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Crushed Flitterby Moth
creature_parts.description: Crushed Flitterby Moths can be an effective and powerful fertilizing agent as well as an endurance-producing agent.

creature_parts.name: Dead Caterpillar
creature_parts.description: Sliced Caterpillars help to improve the potency of particular potions.

creature_parts.name: Dead Leech
creature_parts.description: Dead Leech impact the bloodflow in the body and can be used in the blood replenishing potion. Curiously, they also seem to produce a minor sneezing effect in some concoctions. Researchers have little sense for why this occurs.

creature_parts.name: Dead Spider
creature_parts.description: Dead Spiders are a stabilizing agent. They also make potions chewable/crunchy… If you are looking for that feature??

creature_parts.name: Demiguise Blood
creature_parts.description: Can be used in potions for invisibility or increased perception.

creature_parts.name: Demiguise Skin
creature_parts.description: Demiguise pelts were highly sought after as the hair can be woven into Invisibility Cloaks. These cloaks become more visible over time.

creature_parts.name: Diricawl Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Doe Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Doxy Eggs
creature_parts.description: Doxy eggs can produce an edurance effect when added to potions.

creature_parts.name: Doxy Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Doxy Venom
creature_parts.description: Doxy Venom is rather weak, but can be used as a pesticide, slugicide, wormicide, or for other similar effects.

creature_parts.name: Dragon Claw
creature_parts.description: Dragon claw isn't known to have a general use, though it's possible that one exists. However, it is an essential ingredient in Dragon-Gash Healing Paste.

creature_parts.name: Dragon Dung
creature_parts.description: Dragon dung is incredibly useful as a fertilizer and is essential for growing any plant with a skill level of higher than 5.

creature_parts.name: Dragon Liver
creature_parts.description: Dragon Livers are thought to be useful in digestion potions and are believed to be effective in creating tamper-resistant solutions or magically resistant potions.

creature_parts.name: Dragon's Blood
creature_parts.description: Blood from a dragon.

creature_parts.name: Dragon's Tongue
creature_parts.description: There is no known use for a Dragon's Tongue in a potion. Some scholars believe that the only reason potioncrafter's keep these is so that they can say that they have one.

creature_parts.name: Dragonfly Thorax
creature_parts.description: Dragonfly thoraxes are, historically, a stabilizing agent as well as a component that produces a chalky composition in potions. More recently, potioncrafters seem to have deviated away from this ingredient in favor of various others

creature_parts.name: Dried Billywig Stings
creature_parts.description: Dried Billywig Stings are a healing and enhancing agent. Adding this to a potion will ensure that the potion either has a small healing effect or that it has a buffing/enhancing effect.

creature_parts.name: Duck Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Dugbog Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Dugbog Tongue
creature_parts.description: Useful in potions.

creature_parts.name: Eagle Owl Feather
creature_parts.description: Eagle Owl Feather's ensure that creature-linked potions have a healing effect.

creature_parts.name: Eagle Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Eagle's Blood
creature_parts.description: Eagle's Blood is believed to produce mental clarity when added to potions.

creature_parts.name: Ectoplasm
creature_parts.description: Ectoplasm is used in very powerful potions. It appears to affect the perturbability (for lack of a better word) of the potion. If it is included in the potion, the potion itself will, usually, have a considerable magical resistance. Ectoplasm on its own appears to be an important component to communing with certain spirits.

creature_parts.name: Eel Eyes
creature_parts.description: Eel eyes impact vision, eye size, color, and other features with respect to the eyes when added to potions.

creature_parts.name: Eel Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Elf Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Erkling Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Erumpent Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. However, the hide has a magic resistance that repels most charms and curses.

creature_parts.name: Erumpent Horn
creature_parts.description: No widely known potion involves the use of an entire, whole Erumpent horn. However, its chark and fluid can be separated and are individually quite valuable. It requires a Magical Creatures roll of 15 to separate these. Failure to do so results in an explosion which can cause between 6 and 8 heavy wounds instantly.

creature_parts.name: Erumpent Horn Chalk
creature_parts.description: Erumpent Horn Chalk appears to be a stabilizing agent for potion ingredients that may otherwise be explosive. By increasing the amount of chalk, the volitility of the potion will be decreased. By decreasing or removing it, the potion will become more explosive.

creature_parts.name: Erumpent Horn Fluid
creature_parts.description: Erumpent Horn Fluid is highly volitile and explosive on its own and in potions.

creature_parts.name: Erumpent Tail
creature_parts.description: Erumpent tail is a minor reagent that appears essential to creating an Erumption Potion, but has not been found to have any use in other potions.

creature_parts.name: Fairy Eggs
creature_parts.description: Fairy lay about 50 eggs at a time in gardens, forests, or any place with leaves. These eggs are a delicacy to some creatures, like Bowtruckles.
creature_parts.effect_in_potions: Can improve the effects of cosmetic or endurance potions.

creature_parts.name: Fairy Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Fairy Wings
creature_parts.description: Fairy Wings impact one of three factors when added to potions, stamina, beauty, or flight/weight.

creature_parts.name: Fire Crab Shell
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. However, the jeweled shell is extremely valuable. Jewels on the shell can be extracted and sold.

creature_parts.name: Fish Scales
creature_parts.description: Fish Scales serve one of two roles in potions. First, they are known to serve as a stabilizing agent in potions (can be used to stabilize failing potions). Second, it is widely believed that fish scales can be used in potions involving underwater breathing. While no formula is known to have worked, many researchers still believe that fish scales are essential to making the formula work.

creature_parts.name: Flobberworm Mucus
creature_parts.description: Flobberworm Mucus is usually a (very weak) healing agent.

creature_parts.name: Flobberworm Slices
creature_parts.description: Slices of flobberworm

creature_parts.name: Flying Seahorse Corpses
creature_parts.description: These corpses, when added to potions, appear to impact endurance. However, they also appear to have a positive effect in fertilizing concoctions.

creature_parts.name: Flying Seahorse Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Frog Brains
creature_parts.description: Frog Brains appears to affect intelligence and intelligence-linked skills.

creature_parts.name: Frog Legs
creature_parts.description: Frog Parts are an important component in potions that have a water-related effect. It also appears to be an important component of the Death-Cap Draught for unknown reasons.

creature_parts.name: Frog Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Fwooper Eggs
creature_parts.description: Eggs have interesting patterns. Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Fwooper Feathers
creature_parts.description: Can be used as colorful quills or in potions.

creature_parts.name: Fwooper Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Ghost Vapor
creature_parts.description: Ghost Vapor is most notable for producing anxiety-related effects and seems to be related to creating corporealily-related effects.

creature_parts.name: Giant Purple Toad Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Giant Purple Toad Warts
creature_parts.description: Giant Purple Toad Warts appear to affect either intelligence itself or intelligence-linked skills.

creature_parts.name: Giant Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Glumbumble Treacle
creature_parts.description: Used as an antidote to the hysteria produced by eating Alihotsy leaves. Found in the hives, not on the creature itself.

creature_parts.name: Goblin Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Goose Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Granian Hair
creature_parts.description: Granian Hair appears to affect one's innate magical power when added to a potion.

creature_parts.name: Granian Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Graphorn Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. Resistant to most spells and extremely tough.

creature_parts.name: Graphorn Horns
creature_parts.description: Two golden horns. Might be useful in healing potions.

creature_parts.name: Griffin Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Grindylow Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Ground Horned Slugs
creature_parts.description: Ground Horned Slugs are useful in herbology-linked potions. They also ensure that a potion will have a greyish color.

creature_parts.name: Ground Unicorn Horn
creature_parts.description: Ground Unicorn Horn's only known use is in the highly valuable Oculus potion. It's widely believed to be usable as a healing agent many other forms, but its volatility in potioncrafting make it unpredictable. Any potion made with this ingredient requires a minimum potion check of 20 (with the exception of the Oculus potion).

creature_parts.name: Guinea Fowl Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Harpy Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hebridean Black Dragon Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hidebehind Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hippogriff Feathers
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hippogriff Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hobgoblin Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hodag Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hodag Horns
creature_parts.description: Much of the Hodag's magic is contained in its horns.
creature_parts.raw_effects: In powder form can keep a witch or wizard awake for days, and neutralize any effects for spell or potions that would normally cause drowsiness.
creature_parts.effect_in_potions: Will make the user incredibly alert, increasing perception.

creature_parts.name: Horklump Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Horned Serpent Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Horned Slug Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Horse Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Horseform Kelpie Hair
creature_parts.description: Can be used as a wand core. Might have other magical properties that can be explored.

creature_parts.name: Horseform Kelpie Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Humanform Kelpie Hair
creature_parts.description: Can be used as a wand core. Might have other magical properties that can be explored.

creature_parts.name: Humanform Veela Hair
creature_parts.description: Veela Hair is exceptionally useful in beautifying products and in hair-care products. A single strand is highly valuable, but so powerful that it can be used to make massive batches of product.

creature_parts.name: Hungarian Horntail Hide
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Hydra Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Imp Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Jackalope Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Jarvey Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Jobberknoll Beak
creature_parts.description: Jobberknoll beak has long be thought to have a use in potioning. Many potioneers believe it can impact depressive damage, especially with respect to grieving, but no formula is yet widely known.

creature_parts.name: Jobberknoll Feather
creature_parts.description: Jobberknoll Feather, when added to a potion, ensures that the potion will have an effect on the brain or mental processes. This cannot fail. Essentially, if Jobberknoll feather is included, the potion will have some cognitive effect even if it is not the intended one.

creature_parts.name: Jobberknoll Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Kappa Cap
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Kappa Scales
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Kappa Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Knarl Quills
creature_parts.description: These are similar to porcupine quills. It is known that they do not dissolve in basilisk venom. This was tested by Penelope and Alfred. Can be useful in certain potions.

creature_parts.name: Knarl Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Kneazel Hair
creature_parts.description: Kneazle hair is an often essential ingredient to creating complex magical creatures-linked potions.

creature_parts.name: Kneazle Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Kneazle Whisker
creature_parts.description: Used as a wand core.

creature_parts.name: Leprechaun Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Lionfish Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Lionfish Spines
creature_parts.description: Lionfish Spines are mildly poisonous to plants.

creature_parts.name: Live Horned Slugs
creature_parts.description: Live Horned Slugs are thought to produce transfigurating effects in potions, but few concoctions have shown real promise.

creature_parts.name: Live Leeches
creature_parts.description: When used in other potions, these leeches usually produce a blood-related effect.

creature_parts.name: Lobalug Skin
creature_parts.description: Not useful in potions. May be useful in either in building, as art (or as a collectible), or in artificing.

creature_parts.name: Lobalug Venom

creature_parts.name: Mackled Malaclaw Antenne
